zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger Fiennes於大約1384年出生在英國素可賀斯特蒙瑟時，他的父親William Fiennes II28歲，母親Elizabeth Batisford21歲。他於1422年之前與Elizabeth Holand結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1449年11月18日之前在英國素可賀斯特蒙瑟 卡素，埋葬在英國素可賀斯特蒙瑟。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roger Fiennes于大约1384年出生在英国素可賀斯特蒙瑟时，他的父亲William Fiennes II28岁，母亲Elizabeth Batisford21岁。他于1422年之前与Elizabeth Holand结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1449年11月18日之前在英国素可賀斯特蒙瑟 卡素，埋葬在英国素可賀斯特蒙瑟。

nameMeanings.name: Fiennes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Finnis
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Fiennes (Pas-de-Calais).  See also  Filtness  .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger Fiennes was born about 1384, in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, his father, William Fiennes II, was 28 and his mother, Elizabeth Batisford, was 21. He married Elizabeth Holand before 1422. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 18 November 1449, in Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, England, and was buried in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger Fiennes est né environ 1384, à Herstmonceux, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, William Fiennes II, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Batisford, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Holand avant 1422. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 18 novembre 1449, à Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Herstmonceux, Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger Fiennes um 1384 in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Fiennes II 28 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Batisford 21. Er hat vor 1422 Elizabeth Holand geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 18. November 1449 in Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, England und wurde in Herstmonceux, Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Fiennes è nato il circa 1384 nel Herstmonceux, Sussex, England, il suo padre, William Fiennes II, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Batisford, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Holand prima del 1422. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 18 novembre 1449, nel Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, England, e fu sepolto a Herstmonceux, Sussex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Fiennesが約1384年にイギリススセックスハーストモンセウックスで生まれた時，父William Fiennes IIは28歳，母Elizabeth Batisfordは21歳であった。1422年以前にElizabeth Holandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1449年11月18日以前にイギリススセックスハーストモンセウックス カストルで死去し，イギリススセックスハーストモンセウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Fiennes(이)가 대략 1384년 영국 수세스 허스트몬스우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Fiennes II(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Batisford(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1422년 이전 Elizabeth Holand(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1449년 11월 18일 이전 영국 수세스 허스트몬스우스 카스틀에서 사망했으며 영국 수세스 허스트몬스우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Fiennes nasceu aproximadamente 1384, em Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Fiennes II, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Batisford, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Holand antes 1422. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 18 de novembro de 1449, em Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger Fiennes родился около 1384 г. в местности хирстмонсеукс, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени William Fiennes II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Batisford, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Holand перед 1422 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 18 ноябрь 1449 г. в местности хирстмонсеукс кастл, суссекс, Англия и был похоронен в местности хирстмонсеукс, суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Roger Fiennes nació aproximadamente 1384, en Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, William Fiennes II, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Batisford, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Holand antes de 1422. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió antes de 18 de noviembre de 1449, en Herstmonceux Castle, Sussex, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Herstmonceux, Sussex, Inglaterra.
